user.title: Bose Preset Router
user.description: Choose how the integration should behave overall, including notifications, logging, and how carefully stream handoffs should be checked.

reconfigure.title: Bose Preset Router
reconfigure.description: Fine-tune notifications, logging, and the retry checks for reliable stream handoffs.

user.title: Add Bose device
user.description: Connect one Bose speaker, choose where its presets should play, and decide which preset should start which stream.

reconfigure.title: Edit Bose device
reconfigure.description: Adjust the speaker connection, playback target, volume behavior, and preset-to-stream mapping.
